slides.title: Luxury Shearling Jackets
slides.subtitle: Discover handcrafted shearling jackets designed with soft warmth, clean style, and timeless comfort. Each piece brings premium outerwear quality with a modern look you can wear season after season.

slides.title: Italian Shearling Leather Jackets
slides.subtitle: Premium Italian leather jackets crafted for bold style, smooth comfort, and everyday wear. Designed with clean details and a refined modern finish, each piece adds confidence, warmth, and timeless luxury to your outerwear collection.

config.title: THE SIGNATURE SHEARLING JACKET
config.description: A refined take on classic outerwear, crafted for warmth, comfort, and everyday luxury. Made with premium shearling and clean modern detailing, this jacket brings a bold winter look that feels soft, strong, and timeless with every wear.

reviews.name: Alexander K.
reviews.text: The shearling jacket is absolutely phenomenal. The weight, the fit, and the finish of the Spanish leather exceeded all of my expectations. Customer support helped me select the perfect size.

reviews.name: Sophia M.
reviews.text: I've owned leather jackets from high-end fashion houses, but Pairo's craftsmanship is in a league of its own. It's thick, soft, and rugged yet elegant.

seo.title: Luxury Premium Shearling Jackets for Men & Women | Pairo
seo.description: Explore handcrafted premium shearling jackets and luxury leather outerwear. Genuine sheepskin, exceptional craftsmanship, and worldwide delivery.
seo.focusKeyword: Premium Shearling Jackets

config.title: WHERE COMFORT MEETS CRAFT
config.subtitle: PAIRO brings together soft shearling, refined leather, and modern design to create outerwear that feels as good as it looks. Our pieces are made for lasting warmth, everyday confidence, and a quiet luxury style that never feels overdone.
config.label: OUR STORY

config.title: THE PAIRO PHILOSOPHY
config.label: PHILOSOPHY
config.description: PAIRO was created for people who believe outerwear should feel warm, look refined, and last beyond one season. We focus on premium shearling, smooth leather, clean silhouettes, and careful detailing, so every jacket feels comfortable, confident, and easy to wear in everyday life.

features.title: PREMIUM MATERIAL SOURCING
features.desc: We choose quality shearling and leather materials for their soft feel, natural warmth, and lasting finish. Every piece is selected to support comfort, durability, and a refined outerwear look.

features.title: CUSTOM HARDWARE DETAILS
features.desc: From smooth zippers to clean trims, every detail is chosen with purpose. Our hardware is made to feel strong, look polished, and support everyday wear with ease.

config.title: OUR QUALITY PROMISE
config.label: PROMISE
config.description: We stand behind the comfort, finish, and craftsmanship of every PAIRO jacket. Each piece is made with carefully selected materials, strong stitching, and thoughtful detailing, so your outerwear feels premium, wears beautifully, and stays part of your wardrobe for years.

items.title: EASY SUPPORT
items.desc: If you need help with sizing, care, or order questions, our support team is here to guide you with clear and simple answers.

items.title: ECO PACKAGING
items.desc: Your jacket arrives in clean, protective packaging designed to keep your order safe while reducing unnecessary waste.

config.title: Terms & Conditions
config.content:
Terms & Conditions

Welcome to Pairo Lifestyle ("Pairo," "we," "us," or "our"). These Terms & Conditions ("Terms") govern your access to and use of pairolifestyle.com (the "Site") and any purchase you make through it (collectively, the "Services"). By accessing or using our Services, you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the Site.

1. About Pairo

Pairo Lifestyle is a retailer of premium shearling and leather outerwear, operating online at pairolifestyle.com.

2. Eligibility

By using our Services, you confirm that you are at least 18 years old, or are using the Site under the supervision of a parent or legal guardian, and that you have the legal capacity to enter into a binding contract.

3. Products & Pricing

  • All product descriptions, images, and prices are presented in good faith and to the best of our ability, but we do not guarantee that colors, textures, or finishes will appear exactly as shown on your screen due to differences in displays and lighting.
  • Prices are listed in US Dollars (USD) unless otherwise stated and are subject to change without prior notice.
  • We reserve the right to limit quantities, refuse service, or cancel orders at our discretion. for example, in cases of suspected fraud, pricing errors, or stock unavailability. If we cancel a confirmed order, you will be notified and refunded in full.

4. Orders & Payment

  • By placing an order, you are making an offer to purchase a product, which we may accept or decline.
  • Full payment is required at the time of checkout. We accept the payment methods displayed on our Site at checkout.
  • You are responsible for providing accurate billing, shipping, and contact information. Pairo is not responsible for delays or delivery issues caused by incorrect information provided by the customer.
  • Order cancellations may only be requested before the order has shipped, please contact us as soon as possible if you need to cancel.

5. Shipping & Delivery

Shipping is free worldwide, with an estimated delivery time of 15 working days, subject to occasional delays beyond our control. For full details, please refer to our Shipping & Delivery Policy.

International customers are responsible for any customs duties or import taxes applied by their local authorities.

6. Returns, Exchanges & Refunds

Returns and exchanges are accepted within 32 days of delivery, strictly for items that are damaged, defective, or affected by a genuine size mismatch. Returns are not accepted for change of mind. Custom and made-to-order items are final sale. Approved refunds are processed within 7 business days, and return shipping costs are the customer's responsibility.

Full details are available in our Return & Refund Policy.

7. User Conduct

When using our Services, you agree not to:

  • Use the Site for any unlawful purpose or in violation of these Terms
  • Attempt to gain unauthorized access to our systems, accounts, or data
  • Submit false, misleading, or fraudulent information (including fraudulent orders or payment details)
  • Interfere with or disrupt the security or proper functioning of the Site

We reserve the right to suspend or terminate access to the Services for anyone who violates these Terms.

8. Reviews & User Content

If you submit a review, testimonial, or other content to us, you grant Pairo a non-exclusive, royalty-free right to use, display, and reproduce that content in connection with our Services and marketing, including on our Site and social media. You confirm that any content you submit is your own, truthful, and does not violate any third party's rights.

9. Third-Party Links

Our Site may contain links to third-party websites or services that are not owned or controlled by Pairo. We are not responsible for the content, accuracy, or practices of any third-party site, and including a link does not imply endorsement.

12. Limitation of Liability

To the fullest extent permitted by law, Pairo Lifestyle shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from your use of the Services or any products purchased, including but not limited to delays in delivery, loss of data, or loss of business. Our total liability for any claim relating to your order shall not exceed the amount you paid for the product in question.

13. Disclaimer of Warranties

The Services and all products are provided "as is" and "as available," without warranties of any kind, whether express or implied, except as expressly stated in our policies (such as our Return & Refund Policy). We do not guarantee that the Site will be uninterrupted, error-free, or completely secure.

14. Indemnification

You agree to indemnify and hold harmless Pairo Lifestyle, its owners, employees, and partners from any claims, damages, liabilities, or expenses arising from your violation of these Terms or misuse of our Services.

15. Contact Us

If you have any questions about these Terms, please reach out to us:

Email: support@pairolifestyle.com

config.title: Privacy Policy
config.content:
Privacy Policy — Pairo Lifestyle

Last Updated: June 2026

This Privacy Policy explains how Pairo Lifestyle ("Pairo," "we," "us," or "our") collects, uses, shares, and protects your personal information when you visit pairolifestyle.com (the "Site"), shop with us, or otherwise interact with us (collectively, the "Services").

By using the Services, you agree to the collection and use of information in accordance with this Privacy Policy. If you do not agree with this policy, please discontinue use of the Services.

1. Information We Collect

a) Information You Provide Directly

  • Contact details — name, email address, phone number, billing and shipping address.
  • Order information — items purchased, payment confirmation, order history, and any notes provided at checkout.
  • Account information — username, password, and saved preferences if you create an account.
  • Communications — messages you send us through our contact form, email, WhatsApp, or social media, including sizing, bespoke, or bulk order inquiries.
  • Reviews and feedback — any testimonials or product reviews you choose to submit.

b) Information Collected Automatically

When you browse our Site, we automatically collect certain technical data, including:

  • IP address, browser type, and device information
  • Pages viewed, time spent on pages, and referring/exit URLs
  • Cart activity and items added to wishlists
  • Approximate location (derived from IP address)

We collect this through cookies, pixels, and similar tracking technologies. You can control cookies through your browser settings, though disabling them may affect Site functionality.

c) Information from Third Parties

We may receive information about you from payment processors, shipping carriers, marketing platforms, and analytics providers we work with to operate the Services.

2. How We Use Your Information

We use the information we collect to:

  • Process and fulfill your orders, including payment, shipping, and returns
  • Communicate with you about your order, inquiries, or support requests
  • Provide sizing, bespoke, and custom/bulk order assistance
  • Send you marketing communications, promotions, and offers (you may opt out at any time)
  • Improve our Site, products, and customer experience
  • Detect and prevent fraud, abuse, or security incidents
  • Comply with legal obligations and enforce our Terms of Service

We do not sell your personal information to third parties.

3. How We Share Your Information

We may share your information with:

  • Service providers who help us operate our business, such as payment processors, shipping and logistics partners, and website hosting providers
  • Professional advisors such as legal, accounting, or insurance partners, where necessary
  • Authorities when required by law, to comply with legal process, or to protect our rights, property, or safety, and that of our customers
  • Business transfers — if Pairo is involved in a merger, acquisition, or sale of assets, your information may be transferred as part of that transaction

Each service provider is only given the information needed to perform their function and is expected to handle it securely.

4. Cookies and Tracking Technologies

We use cookies and similar technologies to:

  • Keep your cart and login session active
  • Understand how visitors use our Site so we can improve it
  • Show relevant offers and remarketing ads on other platforms

You can manage or disable cookies through your browser settings at any time. Some features of the Site may not function properly if cookies are disabled.

5. Third-Party Links

Our Site may contain links to third-party websites or platforms (such as social media or shipping carrier tracking pages). We are not responsible for the privacy practices or content of those third-party sites. We encourage you to review their privacy policies before providing any personal information.

6. Data Retention

We retain your personal information for as long as necessary to:

  • Fulfill the purpose for which it was collected (e.g., processing your order)
  • Maintain business and tax records
  • -----------

7. Data Security

We use reasonable administrative, technical, and physical safeguards to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, or disclosure. However, no method of transmission over the internet or electronic storage is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security. We recommend avoiding sharing sensitive information through unsecured channels.

8. International Transfers

Pairo Lifestyle operates in the United States and ships internationally. Your information may be transferred to, stored, and processed in the United States or other countries where our service providers operate. By using the Services, you consent to this transfer, which may involve a different level of data protection than your home country.

9. Your Rights and Choices

Depending on your location, you may have the right to:

  • Access, correct, or update your personal information
  • Request deletion of your personal information
  • Object to or restrict certain uses of your data
  • Lodge a complaint with your local data protection authority

To exercise any of these rights, please contact us using the details below.

10. Changes to This Privacy Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time to reflect changes in our practices or for legal reasons. Material changes will be posted on this page with an updated "Last Updated" date. We encourage you to review this page periodically.

12. Contact Us

If you have questions, concerns, or requests regarding this Privacy Policy or your personal information, please contact us:

Email: support@pairolifestyle.com

seo.title: Privacy Policy | Pairo Lifestyle
seo.description: Read Pairo Lifestyle's official Privacy Policy.

config.title: Shipping & Delivery
config.content:
Shipping & Delivery

At Pairo, we want everything you buy to reach you as smoothly as possible, wherever you are in the world. Here's everything you need to know about how we ship and deliver your order.

Free Worldwide Shipping

Every order from Pairo ships free, anywhere in the world, no exceptions, no minimum spend required. The price you see at checkout is the price you pay; there are no separate shipping charges added on top.

No Surprise Costs

We believe in transparent pricing. The total shown at checkout is the full and final cost of your order, this includes shipping, with no hidden fees added later in the process. What you see is what you pay.

(Note: depending on your destination country, local customs authorities may apply import duties or taxes outside of our control. If applicable, these will be shown and collected at checkout, and you will be responsible for paying this amount. However, if any additional taxes or charges are levied by customs or local authorities after your order has been dispatched or upon delivery, Pairo will cover those costs on your behalf.)

Processing & Delivery Time

  • Orders are carefully prepared, quality-checked, and packaged before being handed to our shipping partners.
  • Standard delivery time is 15 working days from the date your order is placed.
  • Delivery windows are estimates. Occasionally, factors outside our control, such as customs clearance, weather, or carrier delays, may extend delivery slightly beyond this window.
  • We do not process or ship orders on weekends or public holidays.

Order Tracking

Once your order has been handed to our shipping partner, you will receive a confirmation email with your tracking details. Please allow 48 hours for the tracking information to update after dispatch.

If your tracking hasn't updated within working 5 days of pickup, feel free to reach out to us through our Contact Page and our team will look into it for you.

International Orders

Pairo ships to customers worldwide. While we cover the cost of shipping, please note:

  • Some countries may apply customs duties, import taxes, or handling fees upon arrival, depending on local regulations. Where this applies, the estimated amount will be displayed at checkout, and you will need to pay it as part of your order total.
  • If any extra taxes or charges arise at the time of delivery beyond what was shown at checkout, Pairo will pay these on your behalf, you won't be asked to cover any surprise costs after your order has shipped.
  • We recommend checking with your local customs office if you'd like a more detailed estimate of any charges that may apply before your order arrives.
  • International tracking updates may take slightly longer than domestic shipments due to customs processing.

Questions About Your Order

If you have any questions about your shipment, delivery timeline, or tracking status, our team is happy to help, just reach out via our Contact Page

Email: support@pairolifestyle.com

seo.title: Shipping & Delivery | Pairo Lifestyle
seo.description: Read Pairo Lifestyle's official Shipping & Delivery.

config.title: Return & Refund Policy
config.content:
Return & Refund Policy

At Pairo, we want you to love everything you buy. If something isn't right with your order, we're here to help , please read through our policy below to understand how returns, exchanges, and refunds work.

32 Day Return Window

You must report any issues with your order within 48 hours of delivery. Once reported, you may request and send your return within 32 days of receiving your order. Requests or reports made after these windows cannot be accepted.

What Is Eligible for Return or Exchange

We accept returns or exchanges only in the following situations:

  1. The product arrived damaged or defective (clear photos showing the damage, along with the original tags, are required).
  2. There is a genuine size mismatch , meaning the size you ordered does not match the size of the product you actually received.

Please note: Returns or exchanges are not accepted for a simple change of mind. If you no longer want the item but it was received correctly, in good condition, and matching the size you ordered, it does not qualify for return or exchange.

All returned items must be unworn, unused, and in their original condition with all tags and packaging intact.

Custom & Made-to-Order Items

Custom orders and personalized/bespoke pieces are final sale , they are not eligible for return, exchange, or refund, except in the rare case of a manufacturing defect.

How to Request a Return or Exchange

1. Contact us through our Contact Page within the return window.

2. Provide your order number, clear photos of the issue (damage or size discrepancy), and a brief description of the problem.

3. Our team will review your request and confirm the next steps.

Refunds

Once your return is approved and the item is received back, your refund will be processed within 7 business days to your original payment method.

Return Shipping Costs

While we proudly offer free shipping worldwide on all outgoing orders, return shipping is the customer's responsibility. If you need to send a product back for a return or exchange, the shipping cost for sending it back to us will be paid by the customer.

Questions?

If you have any questions about a return, exchange, or refund, reach out to us anytime via our Contact Page.

Email: support@pairolifestyle.com

seo.title: Pairo | Premium Shearling Jackets
seo.description: Experience the ultimate warmth and luxury with Pairo's handcrafted shearling jackets.

slides.title: ELITE SHEARLING COLLECTION
slides.subtitle: Discover the pinnacle of winter luxury with our handcrafted shearling jackets, meticulously designed for the modern individual.

slides.title: TIMELESS FEMININE ELEGANCE
slides.subtitle: Experience unparalleled warmth and sophisticated silhouettes with our exclusive women's shearling outerwear.

slides.title: THE HERITAGE COAT SERIES
slides.subtitle: Classic longline designs that stand the test of time, crafted from the finest double-faced sheepskin.

brand.name: PAIRO
brand.description: Experience the ultimate warmth and luxury with Pairo's handcrafted shearling jackets. Built for comfort, designed for style.

config.title: Limited Edition Shearling
config.description: Premium handcrafted jackets for the modern pioneer.

reviews.name: Michael R.
reviews.text: The warmth of this shearling is unmatched. I've worn it in -10°C weather and felt perfectly comfortable. The craftsmanship is world-class.

reviews.name: Elena S.
reviews.text: Finally found a shearling jacket that doesn't feel bulky. The cut is so elegant, and the leather quality is buttery soft. Worth every penny.

reviews.name: David L.
reviews.text: Pairo jackets are a statement piece. Everywhere I go, I get compliments. Fast shipping and premium packaging too.

seo.title: About Us | Pairo - Premium Shearling Jackets
seo.description: We make handmade shearling jackets with a focus on comfort and high-quality materials.

config.title: Quality Jackets Made to Last
config.subtitle: We make handmade shearling jackets with a focus on comfort and high-quality materials.
config.label: Founded in 1994

config.title: Traditional Methods, Modern Style.
config.label: Our Story
config.description: We don't just make jackets; we focus on every detail. Every stitch is carefully placed, and every material is hand-picked. Our process is simple: we take our time to make things right.

features.title: Materials
features.desc: Highest grade double-faced shearling from prestigious Spanish and Italian tanneries.

features.title: Handmade
features.desc: Hand-cut and hand-sewn by master artisans with decades of experience.

config.title: Our Promise
config.label: Our Commitment
config.description: A jacket from our studio is built to last. We stand by our work and offer services to keep your jacket in great condition for years to come.

items.title: Free Repairs
items.desc: We offer free repair services for life. We make sure your jacket stays in perfect shape so you can wear it for a long time.

items.title: Fair Sourcing
items.desc: We only use materials from tanneries that follow strict environmental and animal welfare rules.

seo.title: Pairo | Premium Shearling Jackets
seo.description: Experience the ultimate warmth and luxury with Pairo's handcrafted shearling jackets.

slides.title: Modern Shearling Jackets
slides.subtitle: Handcrafted from Spanish shearling, reframed for the modern minimalist.

slides.title: Italian Leather Motos
slides.subtitle: Premium grain leather jackets with custom matte-black hardware.

config.title: The Definitive Flight Jacket
config.description: An exquisite interpretation of the classic pilot jacket, redesigned for modern urban exploration. Crafted from hand-selected shearling that matures uniquely with every wear.

reviews.name: Alexander K.
reviews.text: The shearling jacket is absolutely phenomenal. The weight, the fit, and the finish of the Spanish leather exceeded all of my expectations. Customer support helped me select the perfect size.

reviews.name: Sophia M.
reviews.text: I've owned leather jackets from high-end fashion houses, but Pairo's craftsmanship is in a league of its own. It's thick, soft, and rugged yet elegant.

config.description: A refined take on classic outerwear, crafted for warmth, comfort, and everyday luxury. Made with premium shearling and clean modern detailing, this jacket brings a bold winter look that feels soft, strong, and timeless with every wear.

reviews.name: Alexander K.
reviews.text: The shearling jacket is absolutely phenomenal. The weight, the fit, and the finish of the Spanish leather exceeded all of my expectations. Customer support helped me select the perfect size.

reviews.name: Sophia M.
reviews.text: I've owned leather jackets from high-end fashion houses, but Pairo's craftsmanship is in a league of its own. It's thick, soft, and rugged yet elegant.

seo.title: About Us | Pairo - Premium Shearling Jackets
seo.description: We make handmade shearling jackets with a focus on comfort and high-quality materials.

config.title: Craftsmanship Reimagined
config.subtitle: We handcraft premium Spanish shearling and Italian grain leather outerwear designed to last a lifetime.
config.label: OUR STORY

config.title: The Pairo Philosophy
config.label: PHILOSOPHY
config.description: Pairo was born out of a desire to create raw, uncompromising outerwear that marries classic military heritage with clean, minimalist lines. We believe in slow fashion—creating few pieces but doing so with absolute dedication to detail. Our materials are sourced from historic European tanneries, ensuring ethical production and superior longevity.

features.title: Ethical Tannery Sourcing
features.desc: Every pelt is a byproduct of local food industries, sourced exclusively from certified Gold-rated tanneries in Spain and Italy.

features.title: Custom Heavy Zippers
features.desc: We use custom-molded matte steel hardware that feels solid and runs smoothly for decades.

config.title: Our Lifetime Promise
config.label: PROMISE
config.description: We stand behind every seam, zipper, and stitch. Pairo outerwear is designed to age gracefully, developing a rich patina that tells the story of your journeys.

items.title: Free Repairs
items.desc: If a stitch gives out or a zipper catches, we will repair it in our atelier free of charge, forever.

items.title: Eco Packaging
items.desc: Your jacket arrives in a breathable canvas garment bag and a recycled kraft box, completely plastic-free.

config.description: PAIRO was created for people who believe outerwear should feel warm, look refined, and last beyond one season. We focus on premium shearling, smooth leather, clean silhouettes, and careful detailing, so every jacket feels comfortable, confident, and easy to wear in everyday life.

features.title: PREMIUM MATERIAL SOURCING
features.desc: We choose quality shearling and leather materials for their soft feel, natural warmth, and lasting finish. Every piece is selected to support comfort, durability, and a refined outerwear look.

features.title: CUSTOM HARDWARE DETAILS
features.desc: From smooth zippers to clean trims, every detail is chosen with purpose. Our hardware is made to feel strong, look polished, and support everyday wear with ease.

config.title: OUR QUALITY PROMISE
config.label: PROMISE
config.description: We stand behind the comfort, finish, and craftsmanship of every PAIRO jacket. Each piece is made with carefully selected materials, strong stitching, and thoughtful detailing, so your outerwear feels premium, wears beautifully, and stays part of your wardrobe for years.

items.title: EASY SUPPORT
items.desc: If you need help with sizing, care, or order questions, our support team is here to guide you with clear and simple answers.

items.title: ECO PACKAGING
items.desc: Your jacket arrives in clean, protective packaging designed to keep your order safe while reducing unnecessary waste.

seo.title: About Us | Pairo - Premium Shearling Jackets
seo.description: We make handmade shearling jackets with a focus on comfort and high-quality materials.

config.title: WHERE COMFORT MEETS CRAFT
config.subtitle: PAIRO brings together soft shearling, refined leather, and modern design to create outerwear that feels as good as it looks. Our pieces are made for lasting warmth, everyday confidence, and a quiet luxury style that never feels overdone.

seo.title: Pairo | Premium Shearling Jackets
seo.description: Experience the ultimate warmth and luxury with Pairo's handcrafted shearling jackets.

slides.title: Luxury Shearling Jackets
slides.subtitle: Discover handcrafted shearling jackets designed with soft warmth, clean style, and timeless comfort. Each piece brings premium outerwear quality with a modern look you can wear season after season.

slides.title: Italian Shearling Leather Jackets
slides.subtitle: Premium Italian leather jackets crafted for bold style, smooth comfort, and everyday wear. Designed with clean details and a refined modern finish, each piece adds confidence, warmth, and timeless luxury to your outerwear collection.

config.title: THE SIGNATURE SHEARLING JACKET
config.description: A refined take on classic outerwear, crafted for warmth, comfort, and everyday luxury. Made with premium shearling and clean modern detailing, this jacket brings a bold winter look that feels soft, strong, and timeless with every wear.

reviews.name: Alexander K.
reviews.text: The shearling jacket is absolutely phenomenal. The weight, the fit, and the finish of the Spanish leather exceeded all of my expectations. Customer support helped me select the perfect size.

reviews.name: Sophia M.
reviews.text: I've owned leather jackets from high-end fashion houses, but Pairo's craftsmanship is in a league of its own. It's thick, soft, and rugged yet elegant.

seo.title: About Us | Pairo - Premium Shearling Jackets
seo.description: We make handmade shearling jackets with a focus on comfort and high-quality materials.

config.title: WHERE COMFORT MEETS CRAFT
config.subtitle: PAIRO brings together soft shearling, refined leather, and modern design to create outerwear that feels as good as it looks. Our pieces are made for lasting warmth, everyday confidence, and a quiet luxury style that never feels overdone.
config.label: OUR STORY

config.title: THE PAIRO PHILOSOPHY
config.label: PHILOSOPHY
config.description: PAIRO was created for people who believe outerwear should feel warm, look refined, and last beyond one season. We focus on premium shearling, smooth leather, clean silhouettes, and careful detailing, so every jacket feels comfortable, confident, and easy to wear in everyday life.

features.title: PREMIUM MATERIAL SOURCING
features.desc: We choose quality shearling and leather materials for their soft feel, natural warmth, and lasting finish. Every piece is selected to support comfort, durability, and a refined outerwear look.

features.title: CUSTOM HARDWARE DETAILS
features.desc: From smooth zippers to clean trims, every detail is chosen with purpose. Our hardware is made to feel strong, look polished, and support everyday wear with ease.

config.title: OUR QUALITY PROMISE
config.label: PROMISE
config.description: We stand behind the comfort, finish, and craftsmanship of every PAIRO jacket. Each piece is made with carefully selected materials, strong stitching, and thoughtful detailing, so your outerwear feels premium, wears beautifully, and stays part of your wardrobe for years.

items.title: EASY SUPPORT
items.desc: If you need help with sizing, care, or order questions, our support team is here to guide you with clear and simple answers.

items.title: ECO PACKAGING
items.desc: Your jacket arrives in clean, protective packaging designed to keep your order safe while reducing unnecessary waste.

config.description: A refined take on classic outerwear, crafted for warmth, comfort, and everyday luxury. Made with premium shearling and clean modern detailing, this jacket brings a bold winter look that feels soft, strong, and timeless with every wear.

reviews.name: Alexander K.
reviews.text: The shearling jacket is absolutely phenomenal. The weight, the fit, and the finish of the Spanish leather exceeded all of my expectations. Customer support helped me select the perfect size.

reviews.name: Sophia M.
reviews.text: I've owned leather jackets from high-end fashion houses, but Pairo's craftsmanship is in a league of its own. It's thick, soft, and rugged yet elegant.

seo.title: Return & Refund Policy | Pairo Lifestyle
seo.description: Read Pairo Lifestyle's official Return & Refund Policy.

before.title: Return & Refund Policy
before.description: Return & Refund Policy for Pairo Lifestyle.

config.title: Return & Refund Policy
config.content:
Return & Refund Policy

At Pairo, we want you to love everything you buy. If something isn't right with your order, we're here to help , please read through our policy below to understand how returns, exchanges, and refunds work.

32 Day Return Window

You must report any issues with your order within 48 hours of delivery. Once reported, you may request and send your return within 32 days of receiving your order. Requests or reports made after these windows cannot be accepted.

What Is Eligible for Return or Exchange

We accept returns or exchanges only in the following situations:

  • The product arrived damaged or defective (clear photos showing the damage, along with the original tags, are required).
  • There is a genuine size mismatch , meaning the size you ordered does not match the size of the product you actually received.

Please note: Returns or exchanges are not accepted for a simple change of mind. If you no longer want the item but it was received correctly, in good condition, and matching the size you ordered, it does not qualify for return or exchange.

All returned items must be unworn, unused, and in their original condition with all tags and packaging intact.

Custom & Made-to-Order Items

Custom orders and personalized/bespoke pieces are final sale , they are not eligible for return, exchange, or refund, except in the rare case of a manufacturing defect.

How to Request a Return or Exchange

1. Contact us through our Contact Page within the return window.

2. Provide your order number, clear photos of the issue (damage or size discrepancy), and a brief description of the problem.

3. Our team will review your request and confirm the next steps.

Refunds

Once your return is approved and the item is received back, your refund will be processed within 7 business days to your original payment method.

Return Shipping Costs

While we proudly offer free shipping worldwide on all outgoing orders, return shipping is the customer's responsibility. If you need to send a product back for a return or exchange, the shipping cost for sending it back to us will be paid by the customer.

Questions?

If you have any questions about a return, exchange, or refund, reach out to us anytime via our Contact Page.

Email: support@pairolifestyle.com

blogs.title: Shearling Jackets for Modern Outerwear
blogs.content:
A great jacket should do more than keep you warm. It should feel comfortable, look refined, and become a trusted part of your wardrobe. That is the idea behind every PAIRO shearling jacket. Each piece is designed for people who want outerwear that feels premium without looking overdone.

PAIRO focuses on clean design, soft warmth, and lasting comfort. Our shearling jackets bring together a modern look with classic cold-weather protection, making them easy to wear for casual days, travel, evening plans, and everyday winter style.

What Makes a PAIRO Shearling Jacket Different?

A PAIRO shearling jacket is built around comfort and detail. The soft inner feel helps keep you warm, while the outer finish gives your outfit a bold and polished look. Instead of following short-term trends, PAIRO creates outerwear that stays stylish season after season.

Every detail matters, from the fit and stitching to the hardware and finishing. The result is a jacket that feels strong, comfortable, and easy to wear with different outfits.

Designed for Warmth Without Losing Style

Cold-weather clothing should not feel bulky or boring. PAIRO shearling jackets are made to give you natural warmth while keeping a clean and modern shape. They work well with jeans, boots, knitwear, and simple everyday outfits.

This balance of warmth and style makes shearling outerwear a smart choice for people who want one jacket that can handle cold days while still looking sharp.

Premium Materials for Everyday Confidence

The right material changes everything. PAIRO uses quality shearling and leather-style finishes to create jackets that feel soft, durable, and refined. A well-made shearling jacket can instantly upgrade your look while still feeling practical for daily wear.

From morning plans to evening outings, a PAIRO jacket gives you the kind of confidence that comes from wearing something well-crafted.

A Timeless Choice for Men and Women

Shearling jackets have stayed popular because they never lose their appeal. Their strong shape, warm lining, and classic look make them suitable for both men and women. PAIRO designs outerwear with modern comfort in mind, so each piece feels stylish, simple, and easy to wear.

Whether you prefer a bold jacket, a clean coat, or a minimal everyday layer, shearling gives your wardrobe a premium cold-weather upgrade.

How to Style a PAIRO Shearling Jacket

A shearling jacket is easy to style because it already makes a strong statement. For a casual look, wear it with denim, a plain shirt, and boots. For a more refined outfit, pair it with dark trousers, knitwear, and clean leather shoes.

The best part is that shearling works across many looks. It can feel rugged, luxury, modern, or relaxed depending on how you wear it.

Why It Belongs in Your Wardrobe

A PAIRO shearling jacket is not just another winter layer. It is an outerwear piece made for comfort, confidence, and long-term style. With the right care, it can stay beautiful and useful for years.

For anyone looking for premium outerwear that feels warm, looks clean, and works with everyday fashion, PAIRO shearling jackets are a strong choice.

Final Thoughts

PAIRO shearling jackets are made for people who want warmth, comfort, and timeless design in one piece. They bring together premium outerwear style with everyday wearability, giving you a jacket that looks good, feels good, and stays relevant every season.
blogs.author: Pairo Studio

steps.heading: Finest Raw Materials
steps.description: It all starts with the raw materials and since we carry our life in our jackets, we don’t use anything but only the best possible materials. All our jackets are made with full grain natural leather, YKK Zippers, and polyester lining.

steps.heading: Exquisite Craftsmanship
steps.description: Our products are handmade, one at a time by one craftsman with precision and attention to detail, unlike the mass chain production. Not opting for chain production means higher cost but a better quality that you will notice in our stitching.

products.name: A-1 Shearling Flight Jacket
products.shortDescription: The definitive pilot's jacket, reframed for the modern minimalist.

products.name: test
products.shortDescription: The Eclipse Pro Jacket is engineered for customers who want a balance of performance, comfort, and premium fashion aesthetics. Whether styled casually or worn during travel and outdoor activities, it delivers a polished look without compromising functionality.
products.description:
Designed for modern lifestyles, the Eclipse Pro Performance Jacket combines elevated streetwear aesthetics with lightweight all-weather functionality. Crafted using premium breathable fabric technology, this jacket delivers exceptional comfort, durability, and versatility for everyday wear.

Featuring a tailored athletic fit, reinforced stitching, and moisture-resistant outer layering, it transitions seamlessly from casual outings to active environments. The minimalist silhouette is complemented by precision detailing, premium zippers, and structured cuffs for a refined contemporary look.

Available in multiple colorways and sizes, each variant is paired with its own dedicated visual presentation to provide a more immersive shopping experience.

Key Features

  • Premium lightweight performance fabric

  • Breathable and moisture-resistant material

  • Tailored modern fit

  • High-quality zipper closure

  • Soft inner lining for all-day comfort

  • Variant-specific color and image support

  • Designed for urban and active lifestyles

Material

  • Outer: 92% Polyester / 8% Elastane

  • Inner Lining: Soft-touch microfiber blend

Fit & Sizing

  • Regular athletic fit

  • True to size

  • Model is wearing Medium

Care Instructions

  • Machine wash cold

  • Do not bleach

  • Hang dry recommended

  • Low heat ironing only

Available Variants

Colors

  • Midnight Black

  • Arctic White

  • Storm Grey

  • Ocean Blue

Sizes

  • Small

  • Medium

  • Large

  • XL

Why Customers Love It

The Eclipse Pro Jacket is engineered for customers who want a balance of performance, comfort, and premium fashion aesthetics. Whether styled casually or worn during travel and outdoor activities, it delivers a polished look without compromising functionality.

Pairo Men's Brown B3 Shearling Bomber Jacket
products.shortDescription: The Pairo Men’s Brown B3 Shearling Bomber Jacket gives a rugged winter look with a black leather-style exterior and warm brown shearling lining. Its bold collar, zip-front closure, and classic bomber shape make it a strong choice for cold days, travel, outdoor plans, and casual winter outfits.
products.description:
The Pairo Men’s Brown B3 Shearling Bomber Jacket is designed for men who want warmth, comfort, and a strong winter style in one piece. The black leather-style outer finish gives it a sleek look, while the brown shearling collar, lining, cuffs, and hem add softness, warmth, and rich contrast.

Its B3 bomber structure keeps the jacket practical and easy to wear through colder months. The front zipper, side pocket design, clean panel stitching, thick shearling trim, and warm inner feel make it useful for daily winter wear, road trips, and relaxed cold-weather styling.

  • Premium Black Leather-Style Exterior

  • Warm Brown Shearling Collar and Lining

  • B3 Bomber-Inspired Design

  • Front Zipper Closure

  • Side Pocket Styling

  • Clean Panel Stitching

  • Brown Shearling Cuffs and Hem

  • Men’s Rugged Winter Bomber Jacket Style
